{{CargoRelic
|name=Sleeping Venus
|class_id=22535
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=04-18
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Apr 18, 1510 AD, Giorgione left this painting and passed away with his lover.<br>The Sleeping Venus, created by Italian painter Giorgione, with the background completed by the painter's disciple Titian. The goddess of beauty in this painting was inspired by a lady whom Giorgione fell in love with at first sight at a party. They quickly fell in love, and the painter used her as a model to begin the creation of this painting. Unfortunately, the woman fell victim to a plague and passed away with the devoted painter. Giorgione's masterpiece perfectly blends nature and the human body, displaying a unique beauty that had a profound impact on painting in later generations.
|fame=31
|art=73
|fth=43
|civ=52
|tech=44
|ss1=Minion Sim Chests drop 2x Sim Tokens by +1.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +12
|ss2=Minion Sim Chests drop 2x Sim Tokens by +2%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +16
|ss3=Minion Sim Chests drop 2x Sim Tokens by +2.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20
|ss4=Minion Sim Chests drop 2x Sim Tokens by +3.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28
|ss5=Minion Sim Chests drop 2x Sim Tokens by +4.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36
|ss7=Minion Sim Chests drop 2x Sim Tokens by +4.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Fire DMG +15
|skill2=[[File:Mantis skill II.png|50px]]Place in the Mantis Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT +4.5%
}}
